'''鈭歬-ng-t''' ('''kangata''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:point|point]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-ng-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:point|point]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-ng-t
|-
! Lemma
| kangata
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kangatithi|kangatithi]] || [[word:kangatiji|kangatiji]] || [[word:kangatishi|kangatishi]] || [[word:kangati|kangati]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kangatuthuth|kangatuthuth]] || [[word:kangatujuj|kangatujuj]] || [[word:kangatushush|kangatushush]] || [[word:kangat|kangat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kangatuthu|kangatuthu]] || [[word:kangatuju|kangatuju]] || [[word:kangatushu|kangatushu]] || [[word:kangatu|kangatu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kangatufuth|kangatufuth]] || [[word:kangatufuj|kangatufuj]] || [[word:kangatufush|kangatufush]] || [[word:kangatuf|kangatuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kangatethe|kangatethe]] || [[word:kangateje|kangateje]] || [[word:kangateshe|kangateshe]] || [[word:kangate|kangate]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kangatothoth|kangatothoth]] || [[word:kangatojoj|kangatojoj]] || [[word:kangatoshosh|kangatoshosh]] || [[word:kangat|kangat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kangatotho|kangatotho]] || [[word:kangatojo|kangatojo]] || [[word:kangatosho|kangatosho]] || [[word:kangato|kangato]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kangatofoth|kangatofoth]] || [[word:kangatofoj|kangatofoj]] || [[word:kangatofosh|kangatofosh]] || [[word:kangatof|kangatof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kangat忙th忙|kangat忙th忙]] || [[word:kangat忙j忙|kangat忙j忙]] || [[word:kangat忙sh忙|kangat忙sh忙]] || [[word:kangat忙|kangat忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kangatathath|kangatathath]] || [[word:kangatajaj|kangatajaj]] || [[word:kangatashash|kangatashash]] || [[word:kangat|kangat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kangatatha|kangatatha]] || [[word:kangataja|kangataja]] || [[word:kangatasha|kangatasha]] || [[word:kangata|kangata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kangatafath|kangatafath]] || [[word:kangatafaj|kangatafaj]] || [[word:kangatafash|kangatafash]] || [[word:kangataf|kangataf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:kangatasha|kangatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gokangatasha|gokangatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokikangatasha|gokikangatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:kangatn眉sha|kangatn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokangatnkn眉sha|gokangatnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokikangatn眉sha|gokikangatn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kangatsh毛sha|kangatsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokangatnksh毛sha|gokangatnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikangatsh毛sha|gokikangatsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kangatrosha|kangatrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokangatnkrosha|gokangatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikangatrosha|gokikangatrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kangatmusha|kangatmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokangatnkmusha|gokangatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikangatmusha|gokikangatmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:kangatsherasha|kangatsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokangatnksherasha|gokangatnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokikangatsherasha|gokikangatsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:kangatngasha|kangatngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokangatnkngasha|gokangatnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokikangatngasha|gokikangatngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kangatyasha|kangatyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokangatnkyasha|gokangatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokikangatyasha|gokikangatyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:kangatyamasha|kangatyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokangatnkyamasha|gokangatnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokikangatyamasha|gokikangatyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:kangatn眉sh毛sha|kangatn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokangatnkn眉sh毛sha|gokangatnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikangatn眉sh毛sha|gokikangatn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kangatn眉rosha|kangatn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokangatnkn眉rosha|gokangatnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikangatn眉rosha|gokikangatn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kangatn眉musha|kangatn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokangatnkn眉musha|gokangatnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikangatn眉musha|gokikangatn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:kangatsh毛n眉sha|kangatsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokangatnksh毛n眉sha|gokangatnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikangatsh毛n眉sha|gokikangatsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kangatsh毛rosha|kangatsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokangatnksh毛rosha|gokangatnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikangatsh毛rosha|gokikangatsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kangatsh毛musha|kangatsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokangatnksh毛musha|gokangatnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikangatsh毛musha|gokikangatsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:kangatron眉sha|kangatron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokangatnkron眉sha|gokangatnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikangatron眉sha|gokikangatron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:kangatrosh毛sha|kangatrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokangatnkrosh毛sha|gokangatnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikangatrosh毛sha|gokikangatrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kangatromusha|kangatromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokangatnkromusha|gokangatnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikangatromusha|gokikangatromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:kangatmun眉sha|kangatmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokangatnkmun眉sha|gokangatnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikangatmun眉sha|gokikangatmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:kangatmush毛sha|kangatmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokangatnkmush毛sha|gokangatnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikangatmush毛sha|gokikangatmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kangatmurosha|kangatmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokangatnkmurosha|gokangatnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikangatmurosha|gokikangatmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:kangat|kangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:k忙ng忙t|k忙ng忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hokangat|hokangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hok忙ng忙t|hok忙ng忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohokangat|hohokangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohok忙ng忙t|hohok忙ng忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉kangat|n眉kangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉k忙ng忙t|n眉k忙ng忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉kangat|n眉n眉kangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉k忙ng忙t|n眉n眉k忙ng忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂kangat|n茂kangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂k忙ng忙t|n茂k忙ng忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂kangat|n茂n茂kangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂k忙ng忙t|n茂n茂k忙ng忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lukangat|lukangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luk忙ng忙t|luk忙ng忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulukangat|lulukangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluk忙ng忙t|luluk忙ng忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:likangat|likangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lik忙ng忙t|lik忙ng忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilikangat|lilikangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilik忙ng忙t|lilik忙ng忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kokangat|kokangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kok忙ng忙t|kok忙ng忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokokangat|kokokangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokok忙ng忙t|kokok忙ng忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kekangat|kekangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kek忙ng忙t|kek忙ng忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekekangat|kekekangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekek忙ng忙t|kekek忙ng忙t]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
